tokens.notes: Primary dominant brand color; RGB 0,82,155; CMYK 100,76,6,1; Pantone 2145 C. Also called Deep Blue (dominant) in internal banner.
Primary color; RGB 250,163,27; CMYK 0,42,100,0; Pantone 137 C. Called Amber Orange (secondary accent) in internal banner.
Primary color; RGB 255,198,10; CMYK 0,23,100,0; Pantone 7548 C. Called Golden Yellow (tertiary accent) in internal banner.
Secondary color; RGB 53,140,203; CMYK 75,35,0,0. Chart dominant with Brand Blue; subhead color in text-heavy callouts.
Secondary color; RGB 0,61,116; CMYK 100,83,29,14. Button fill in gradient callout CTA.
Secondary color; RGB 1,30,69; CMYK 100,89,40,49. Used as drop-shadow color at low opacity.
Tertiary color; RGB 242,106,56; CMYK 0,73,87,0. Sparing accent only, never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data.
Tertiary color; RGB 230,240,249; CMYK 8,2,0,0. Callout box fill / chart panel.
Tertiary color; RGB 254,241,200; CMYK 0,3,24,0. Text-heavy callout box fill.
Tertiary color; RGB 33,33,33; CMYK 0,0,0,88. Body text on light backgrounds.
Tertiary color; RGB 255,255,255; CMYK 0,0,0,0. Icon badge fill, button label, text on dark.

Blue backgrounds, waves.
